messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0157",
  "title": "策略",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 策略

无尽冬日

奔奔王国

旭日之城

破晓的曙光

万国觉醒

冒险大作战

冒险者日记

19

杖劍傳說：坎斯汀之約

剑与远征启程

弹壳特攻队

战火与秩序

王国纪元

泰拉贝尔

黑道风云

message.content: This section answers questions regarding which video game titles are categorized under the "Strategy" (策略) genre. It contains a list of game entities: 无尽冬日, 奔奔王国, 旭日之城, 破晓的曙光, 万国觉醒, 冒险大作战, 冒险者日记, 杖劍傳說：坎斯汀之約, 剑与远征启程, 弹壳特攻队, 战火与秩序, 王国纪元, 泰拉贝尔, and 黑道风云. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
